annotation.insufficient_information_handling: excluded from judged precision and false-admission denominators; always reported separately

metrics.agreement: unweighted Cohen's kappa over the four labels before adjudication
metrics.no_labels_behavior: emit null metrics and pending status; never infer labels from qrels, ranker, heuristics or an LLM
metrics.normalization_added_false_admission_rate: not_relevant normalization_added pairs divided by sufficiently informed normalization_added pairs
metrics.precision_at_20: reported only when every returned Top-20 query-paper pair for that strategy has a primary human label; otherwise null with an explicit incomplete-coverage reason
metrics.primary_label: agreed label when annotators agree, otherwise adjudicated label
metrics.sample_precision: for each strategy, relevant plus partially_relevant sampled returned pairs divided by all sufficiently informed sampled returned pairs
metrics.stratified_precision_estimate: inverse inclusion probability weighted estimate over the three registered audit strata; reported with sampling-frame coverage and never presented as complete canonical Precision@20

sampling.allocation: balanced water-filling across dataset x stratum cells; allocate one item per non-exhausted cell in fixed order per round until the cap or universe exhaustion
sampling.display_order: ascending independent SHA-256 of seed, display namespace, dataset, case and canonical paper identity
sampling.identity: production unified paper identity; one item per dataset case and equivalent paper across strategies
sampling.public_sample_id: sequential SPAR-LX-0001 identifiers assigned only after display randomization; IDs do not encode hidden fields
sampling.selection_order: ascending SHA-256 of seed, dataset, stratum, query fingerprint and canonical paper identity

strata.baseline_only: returned by baseline and not by lexical_normalization_v1
strata.normalization_added: returned by lexical_normalization_v1 and not by baseline
strata.shared_rank_shifted: returned by both with absolute returned-list rank change at least 5
